title: Happu Ki Ultan Paltan
desc: Amma's misunderstanding about Happu and Rajesh is cleared up. She asks Happu to participate with her in a neighbourhood dance competition.

title: Bhabiji Ghar Par Hai 2.0
desc: Tiwari and Anita stage a fake wedding to acquire a mansion, a ruse that Vibhuti and Angoori join. However, things take a turn when a ghost begins to haunt everyone.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
desc: There is a bet between Tiwari and Angoori on who can control the house expenses efficiently. They divide 10,000 rupees among themselves and start on the plan.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
desc: Vibhuti tries to help Angoori win the challenge by stealing supplies from his own house and keeping it in Angoori's refrigerator. Later, Manmohan learns that Anita has decided to challenge Vibhuti.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
desc: Anita catches Vibhuti keeping rations in her refrigerator and sends him back. Later, when Laddoo expresses that he is weak in mathematics,Vibhuti promises to tutor him.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
desc: Anita tells Laddoo that she has taught geometry to Manmohan, who will tutor him in the subject. However, she is disheartened to learn that Manmohan has made no efforts to teach Laddoo.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
desc: Vibhuti Narayan Mishra and Manmohan Tiwari live in the same neighbourhood in Kanpur. They both try to impress each other's wives but end up landing in peculiar situations.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
desc: Amma Ji breaks the news of Angoori's pregnancy to the Mishras during dinner. Later, the Tiwaris and Anita dance together.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
desc: Vibhuti exits Angoori's baby shower celebration. Later, as he plans to move away, Manmohan overhears and pleads with him to stay.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
desc: Vibhuti is ecstatic at hearing that Angoori is not pregnant and ponders over his decision of relocating; Angoori dreams of eating mangoes and requests Manmohan to get some for her.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
desc: Anita assumes that Vibhuti bought the mangoes for her. Later, he gives them to Angoori and warns her not to tell Manmohan.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
desc: Inspector Happu presents Vibhuti as the mango thief to everyone. Meanwhile, Anita gives tips on anger management to Manmohan to help him control his temper.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
desc: Manmohan manages to use Anita's tips to control his anger but Vibhuti seems intent on riling him up. Later, Vibhuti disturbs Manmohan and Angoori as they are spending time with each other.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
desc: Anita plans a Manali trip, Vibhuti refuses and Manmohan learns, decides to go to Manali.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
desc: Vibhuti Narayan Mishra and Manmohan Tiwari live in the same neighbourhood in Kanpur. They both try to impress each other's wives but end up landing in peculiar situations.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
desc: During a conversation between the Tiwaris and Mishras, Anita receives a call about going to Manali. Meanwhile, Manmohan recovers suddenly while Vibhuti relapses.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
desc: Manmohan misinterprets Anita's skit practice as shouting and gets upset.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
desc: An extremely emotional Angoori reveals to Manmohan that Vibhuti is her childhood friend Bhoja, but Manmohan is aware of the fact that Vibhuti is lying.

title: Laal Ishq
desc: An anthology of passionate love stories backed with strong emotions and supernatural elements, set in different backdrops.

title: Laal Ishq
desc: Siddhak sacrifices his wife, Ramaiya, on his mentor's advice to achieve immortality. However, Ramaiya returns from the dead to protect the village of Pijaura and seek her revenge.

title: Paramavatar Shri Krishna
desc: Nanda falsely claims Balarama is his son, given by his younger brother. Meanwhile, hunger drives Balarama to attack Kansa's army when denied food.

title: Man Mohini
desc: A new couple, Ram and Sia, are experiencing some seriously creepy and unsettling things in their marriage. Is it just bad luck, or something more sinister?

title: Bhabiji Ghar Par Hai 2.0
desc: Tiwari and Anita stage a fake wedding to acquire a mansion, a ruse that Vibhuti and Angoori join. However, things take a turn when a ghost begins to haunt everyone.

title: Bhabiji Ghar Par Hai 2.0
desc: Tiwari and Anita stage a fake wedding to acquire a mansion, a ruse that Vibhuti and Angoori join. However, things take a turn when a ghost begins to haunt everyone.

title: Gharwali Pedwali
desc: Jeetu Pandey finds himself caught living a life of duality. He juggles his time with two mothers, two contrasting belief systems, and two spouses while hiding one from another.
